proposals.Business Justification: We lack a centralized system for collecting and analyzing customer feedback. Currently feedback comes through emails, support tickets, and ad-hoc surveys with no single source of truth.
proposals.Goals Outcomes: Create a unified portal where customers can submit feedback, rate features, and vote on feature requests. Enable product teams to track sentiment trends and prioritize roadmap items based on real customer input.
proposals.Target Users: Product managers, customer success team, end customers
proposals.Expected Business Impact: Reduce churn by 15% through faster response to customer concerns. Increase NPS by 10 points within 6 months. Provide data-driven feature prioritization for the product roadmap.
proposals.Custom AI Prompt:
Build a Customer Feedback Portal application with the following capabilities:
- Public-facing feedback submission form with category tags
- Upvoting system for feature requests
- Sentiment analysis dashboard for product managers
- Integration with existing CRM for customer identification
- Priority scoring based on customer tier and vote count
- Export capabilities for quarterly business reviews
proposals.Approved Prompt:
Build a Customer Feedback Portal application with the following capabilities:
- Public-facing feedback submission form with category tags
- Upvoting system for feature requests
- Sentiment analysis dashboard for product managers
- Integration with existing CRM for customer identification
- Priority scoring based on customer tier and vote count
- Export capabilities for quarterly business reviews
proposals.Decision Reason: Strong business case with clear ROI. Minimal overlap with existing tools. Aligns with our customer-first strategy.

proposals.Business Justification: New employee onboarding takes 2-3 weeks and involves manual checklist tracking across HR, IT, and department managers. Steps are frequently missed, leading to delayed access and poor first impressions.
proposals.Goals Outcomes: Automated onboarding workflow that guides new hires through each step, assigns tasks to relevant departments, and tracks completion in real-time. Target: reduce onboarding time from 3 weeks to 3 days.
proposals.Target Users: HR team, IT provisioning, department managers, new employees
proposals.Expected Business Impact: Save 40 hours of HR time per new hire. Reduce time-to-productivity from 3 weeks to 1 week. Improve new hire satisfaction scores by 25%.
proposals.Custom AI Prompt:
Build an Employee Onboarding Wizard application:
- Step-by-step onboarding workflow with role-based task assignment
- Automated IT provisioning requests (email, VPN, app access)
- Progress tracking dashboard for HR managers
- New hire self-service portal with orientation materials
- Integration with existing ITSM for ticket creation
- Compliance document collection and e-signature tracking
proposals.Approved Prompt:
Build an Employee Onboarding Wizard application:
- Step-by-step onboarding workflow with role-based task assignment
- Automated IT provisioning requests (email, VPN, app access)
- Progress tracking dashboard for HR managers
- New hire self-service portal with orientation materials
- Integration with existing ITSM for ticket creation
- Compliance document collection and e-signature tracking
proposals.Decision Reason: High-impact automation opportunity. Some overlap with ITSM ticket creation but complementary. Approved with recommendation to integrate with existing ITSM.
proposals.Similar Apps: ITSM Console (partial overlap on ticket creation)

proposals.Business Justification: Third-party vendor risk assessments are tracked in spreadsheets. We have 200+ vendors with varying risk profiles, and compliance audits require weeks of manual data gathering.
proposals.Goals Outcomes: Centralized vendor risk management with automated risk scoring, contract tracking, and compliance reporting. Enable real-time visibility into vendor risk posture.
proposals.Target Users: Procurement team, compliance officers, CISO, legal
proposals.Expected Business Impact: Reduce audit preparation time by 80%. Identify high-risk vendors proactively. Meet regulatory requirements for third-party risk management (SOC 2, ISO 27001).
proposals.Known Alternatives: ServiceNow VRM (too expensive), OneTrust (overkill for our scale)
proposals.Custom AI Prompt:
Build a Vendor Risk Dashboard:
- Vendor profile management with risk scoring (1-10)
- Automated questionnaire distribution and tracking
- Contract management with renewal alerts
- Compliance mapping to SOC 2, ISO 27001, GDPR
- Risk heat map visualization
- Executive reporting with drill-down capabilities
proposals.Similar Apps: Governance Hub (partial overlap on compliance tracking)

proposals.Business Justification: Employees spend an average of 1.8 hours per day searching for information across multiple systems (wiki, SharePoint, email, Slack). There is no unified search capability.
proposals.Goals Outcomes: AI-powered unified search that indexes all internal knowledge sources. Natural language queries with ranked results and contextual snippets.
proposals.Expected Business Impact: Save 30 minutes per employee per day. Reduce duplicate content creation by 40%. Improve knowledge reuse across departments.
proposals.Custom AI Prompt:
Build an Internal Knowledge Search platform:
- Unified search across knowledge base, wiki, and document store
- AI-powered natural language query understanding
- Faceted search with source, date, author, and topic filters
- Auto-suggestions and related content recommendations
- Search analytics dashboard for content gap identification
- API for embedding search in other applications

proposals.Business Justification: Sales territories are managed in spreadsheets and updated quarterly. Territory overlap causes customer confusion and internal conflicts. No visualization of territory coverage gaps.
proposals.Goals Outcomes: Interactive territory management tool with visual mapping, overlap detection, and performance analytics per territory.
proposals.Expected Business Impact: Eliminate territory conflicts. Identify underserved regions. Improve territory assignment fairness by 30%.
proposals.Custom AI Prompt:
Build a Sales Territory Mapper:
- Interactive map-based territory visualization
- Territory assignment and boundary management
- Overlap detection with conflict resolution workflow
- Performance metrics per territory (revenue, accounts, pipeline)
- Integration with CRM for account data
- Scenario planning for territory rebalancing

proposals.Business Justification: Annual compliance audits (SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA) are managed through email chains and shared folders. Evidence collection is manual and time-consuming.
proposals.Goals Outcomes: Automated audit management with evidence collection, control mapping, and real-time compliance dashboards.
proposals.Expected Business Impact: Reduce audit preparation time from 6 weeks to 2 weeks. Maintain continuous compliance posture rather than point-in-time assessments.
proposals.Known Alternatives: Drata (expensive), Vanta (too focused on startups), manual process (current)
proposals.Custom AI Prompt:
Build a Compliance Audit Tracker:
- Control framework management (SOC 2, ISO 27001)
- Evidence collection with automated screenshot and log gathering
- Audit timeline and milestone tracking
- Finding management with remediation workflows
- Compliance dashboard with control status overview
- Auditor portal for external review access
proposals.Decision Reason: Significant overlap with existing Governance Hub compliance features. Recommend enhancing Governance Hub instead of building a separate tool.

proposals.Business Justification: Customer success team manually assesses account health using gut feeling. No systematic scoring leads to surprise churn and missed expansion opportunities.
proposals.Goals Outcomes: Automated health scoring based on product usage, support tickets, NPS responses, and payment history. Early warning system for at-risk accounts.
proposals.Target Users: Customer success managers, account executives, VP of Customer Success
proposals.Expected Business Impact: Identify at-risk accounts 60 days earlier. Increase net revenue retention from 95% to 105%. Reduce churn by 20%.
proposals.Custom AI Prompt:
Build a Customer Health Score Engine:
- Composite health score (1-100) based on weighted metrics
- Usage analytics integration (login frequency, feature adoption)
- Support ticket sentiment analysis
- Payment history and billing status tracking
- Automated alerts for declining health scores
- CSM action recommendations based on health trends

proposals.Business Justification: Teams spend 10+ hours per week building recurring reports manually. Each team uses different tools and formats, making cross-team reporting inconsistent.
proposals.Goals Outcomes: Self-service report builder that connects to Kinetic data sources. Drag-and-drop report designer with scheduling and distribution.
proposals.Target Users: All department managers, business analysts, executives
proposals.Expected Business Impact: Save 40+ hours per week across the organization. Standardize reporting formats. Enable self-service analytics for non-technical users.
proposals.Custom AI Prompt:
Build an Automated Report Builder:
- Drag-and-drop report designer with chart types
- Connection to Kinetic API data sources
- Scheduled report generation and email distribution
- Template library for common report types
- Export to PDF, CSV, and Excel
- Role-based access control for reports
proposals.Decision Reason: Core functionality overlaps with planned analytics features in Data Atlas. Merging requirements into the Atlas roadmap.

proposals.Business Justification: Field employees submit timesheets on paper forms that are manually entered into the payroll system. This causes frequent errors and delays of 1-2 weeks in payment processing.
proposals.Goals Outcomes: Mobile-first timesheet submission with GPS location verification, project code selection, and automatic payroll integration.
proposals.Target Users: Field employees, project managers, payroll team
proposals.Expected Business Impact: Eliminate manual data entry errors (currently 8% error rate). Reduce payroll processing time from 2 weeks to 2 days. Improve field employee satisfaction.
proposals.Custom AI Prompt:
Build a Mobile Timesheet App:
- Mobile-responsive time entry with project/task selection
- GPS-based location verification for field workers
- Manager approval workflow
- Weekly/monthly summary views
- Payroll system integration (export format)
- Overtime calculation and compliance alerts

proposals.Business Justification: Our AI/ML team spends 60% of their time on data preparation. Training data is scattered across systems with no version control or quality tracking.
proposals.Goals Outcomes: Centralized training data management with version control, quality scoring, labeling workflows, and dataset composition tools.
proposals.Target Users: Data scientists, ML engineers, data labelers, AI product managers
proposals.Expected Business Impact: Reduce data preparation time by 50%. Improve model accuracy by ensuring training data quality. Enable reproducible experiments with versioned datasets.
proposals.Known Alternatives: Label Studio (labeling only), DVC (too technical), Hugging Face Datasets (public-focused)
proposals.Custom AI Prompt:
Build an AI Training Data Curator:
- Dataset catalog with version control and lineage tracking
- Data labeling interface with quality scoring
- Automated data quality checks (completeness, consistency, bias)
- Dataset composition tools (split, merge, sample, augment)
- Integration with ML pipelines (export to common formats)
- Collaboration features for labeling teams with inter-annotator agreement

comments.Author: second_admin
comments.Content: Strong proposal. The customer feedback gap is real and this would be a valuable addition to our platform. Let me check for overlap with existing CRM features.

comments.Author: second_admin
comments.Content: Decision: Approved. Strong business case with clear ROI.

comments.Author: second_admin
comments.Content: Marked ready for AI build after prompt finalization.

comments.Author: second_admin
comments.Content: Good automation candidate. Need to ensure IT provisioning integration is feasible with existing ITSM hooks.

comments.Author: second_admin
comments.Content: Interesting proposal. Checking overlap with Governance Hub compliance features. The vendor risk angle is different enough that this might warrant a standalone app.

comments.Author: second_admin
comments.Content: Which knowledge sources would you want indexed in phase 1? The scope seems very broad. Also, what is the estimated data volume?

comments.Author: second_admin
comments.Content: Significant overlap detected with Governance Hub. The compliance scanning and audit features already cover most of these requirements.

comments.Author: second_admin
comments.Content: Decision: Rejected. Overlaps with Governance Hub.

comments.Author: second_admin
comments.Content: The reporting features overlap heavily with Data Atlas analytics roadmap. Recommending merge.

comments.Author: second_admin
comments.Content: This fills a unique gap in our tooling. No overlap with existing apps. Strong alignment with our AI strategy. Scoring highly on innovation.

reviews.Similar Apps Found: No direct overlap found in current portfolio
reviews.Overlap Analysis: CRM has customer data but no feedback collection mechanism. Knowledge Portal is internal-focused. This fills a genuine gap in our customer-facing toolset.
reviews.Recommendation Notes: Strong proposal with clear business value. Recommend approval with phased approach - start with feedback collection, add sentiment analysis in phase 2.

reviews.Overlap Analysis: The IT provisioning component overlaps with ITSM ticket creation, but the broader onboarding workflow is unique. Recommend integrating with ITSM rather than duplicating.
reviews.Recommendation Notes: High value but complex. Approve with recommendation to build ITSM integration rather than standalone provisioning. Phase 1: core workflow. Phase 2: integrations.

reviews.Overlap Analysis: Some overlap with Governance Hub on compliance tracking and reporting. However, the vendor risk management angle (questionnaires, contract management, vendor profiles) is distinct enough.
reviews.Recommendation Notes: Recommend approval with clear delineation from Governance Hub. Vendor-specific features (questionnaire, contract management) should be the focus. Avoid duplicating compliance dashboards.

reviews.Similar Apps Found: Governance Hub (high overlap on compliance scanning, audit trail, change detection)
reviews.Overlap Analysis: 70%+ functional overlap with Governance Hub. The compliance audit tracking, evidence collection, and control mapping features are largely covered by the existing platform scanner and change feed. Building separately would create confusion and maintenance burden.
reviews.Recommendation Notes: Recommend rejecting in favor of enhancing Governance Hub. The specific audit management features (auditor portal, finding management) could be added as new tabs in Governance Hub rather than a standalone app.

reviews.Similar Apps Found: Data Atlas (significant overlap on data querying and visualization)
reviews.Overlap Analysis: The core report building capability overlaps with planned Data Atlas analytics features. The data source connections, chart types, and scheduling are all on the Atlas roadmap. Merging would avoid duplication.
reviews.Recommendation Notes: Merge requirements into Data Atlas roadmap. The self-service reporting angle is valuable but should be a feature of Atlas, not a standalone app.

reviews.Similar Apps Found: None - unique capability in our portfolio
reviews.Overlap Analysis: No overlap with existing applications. This is a completely new capability area. The data management and versioning features are unique to ML workflows and not covered by any existing tool.
reviews.Recommendation Notes: Strong innovation score and strategic alignment with our AI investment thesis. Complexity is high but the value justifies it. Recommend phased approach starting with dataset catalog and version control.
